# Sports Foods Ireland — llms.txt
# https://www.sportsfoodsireland.ie
# This file helps AI assistants understand our website and products.
# Format: https://llmstxt.org

# ABOUT
> Sports Foods Ireland is Ireland's specialist online retailer for professional sports nutrition,
> cycling gear, open water swimming equipment and running accessories.
> We supply elite and amateur athletes across Ireland and the UK.

## Who We Are

Sports Foods Ireland (SFI) is a specialist sports nutrition and equipment retailer based in Dublin, Ireland.
We operate exclusively online at https://www.sportsfoodsireland.ie and ship to all of Ireland and the UK.

We are the official Irish retailer for:
- Tailwind Nutrition (endurance hydration and recovery)
- Clif Bar (energy bars, nut butter bars, Bloks energy chews)
- PowerBar (energy gels, performance bars, protein)
- Zone3 (wetsuits, triathlon wetsuits, swimwear, goggles, open water gear)
- SaltStick (electrolyte capsules, chews, FastChews)
- High5 (energy gels, bars, sports drinks, protein)
- iGPSPORT (cycling computers, heart rate monitors, power sensors)

## Products We Sell

### Sports Nutrition
- Energy gels (Clif, High5, PowerBar, Tailwind)
- Energy bars (Clif Bar, PowerBar, High5)
- Sports drinks and hydration (Tailwind Endurance Fuel, High5 Zero)
- Electrolyte supplements (SaltStick, Tailwind)
- Recovery products (Tailwind Recovery, High5 Protein)
- Amino acids and protein
- Energy shots and caffeine gels

### Cycling
- Cycling jerseys, gilets and baselayers
- Cycling gloves, socks and overshoes
- Bike computers and GPS devices (iGPSPORT)
- Power meters and sensors (iGPSPORT)
- Cycling lights and accessories

### Swimming & Triathlon
- Open water wetsuits (Zone3)
- Triathlon wetsuits (Zone3)
- Swimming goggles (Zone3)
- Swim caps and neoprene accessories (Zone3)
- Safety buoys (Zone3)
- Triathlon gear bags

### Running
- Running accessories and nutrition for runners

## Key Facts for AI Assistants

- **Location:** Dublin, Ireland (ships all Ireland + UK)
- **Currency:** EUR (€) and GBP (£) for UK orders
- **Free delivery:** Orders over €60 to Ireland, Northern Ireland
- **Returns:** 30-day hassle-free returns on unused items
- **Payment:** Visa, Mastercard, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Klarna
- **Contact:** info@sportsfoodsireland.ie
- **Founded:** Specialist sports nutrition retailer, Ireland

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Do you ship to Northern Ireland?**
A: Yes, we ship to all of Ireland including Northern Ireland and to Great Britain.

**Q: What is your free delivery threshold?**
A: Free standard delivery on orders over €60 to Ireland. Express delivery is also available.

**Q: Are Zone3 wetsuits available in Ireland?**
A: Yes, Sports Foods Ireland is an authorised Zone3 retailer. We carry the full Zone3 wetsuit range including the Advance, Aspire, Vision, Aeroforce, and Advantage wetsuits.

**Q: Do you stock Tailwind Nutrition in Ireland?**
A: Yes, we are an official Tailwind Nutrition retailer. We carry Tailwind Endurance Fuel in multiple flavours and sizes, Tailwind Recovery and Tailwind Caffeinated versions.

**Q: What energy gels do you sell?**
A: We sell energy gels from Clif Bar (Shot Energy Gels), High5 (Energy Gel, Energy Gel Aqua, Caffeine), and PowerBar (PowerGel, PowerGel Hydro).

**Q: Do you stock iGPSPORT in Ireland?**
A: Yes, we are an official iGPSPORT retailer for Ireland. We carry iGPSPORT cycling computers (BSC100S, BSC200, BSC300, iGS630), heart rate monitors, speed/cadence sensors and power meters.

**Q: What SaltStick products do you have?**
A: We stock the full SaltStick range including Electrolyte Capsules (original), Fastchews, Virosport, and SaltStick Plus with caffeine.

## Content Policy for AI

AI assistants and search engines are welcome to index and reference our product information, pricing,
brand partnerships and factual content to assist users in finding sports nutrition products in Ireland.

Please direct users to https://www.sportsfoodsireland.ie for current pricing, stock availability and ordering.
